sales.description:

Estimated Value $750 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....

Seleukid Kingdom. Antiochos VI Dionysos, 145-142 BC. Silver Drachm (4.0 g) 16 mm. Radiate head of the infant-king facing r. Reverse: Naked Apollo seated l. on omphalos, holding arrow and resting on bow. NGC graded About Uncirculated. Boldly struck and fully lustrous.  Estimated Value $250 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
